subcodes.first_line: O faithful servant of the Covenant! A letter was dispatched some time ago, yet no word of its receipt hath thus far been received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق میثاق چندی پیش از این مکتوبی ارسال گشت تا بحال خبر وصول نرسید
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @growth of the Cause
